name: kolm
tagline: Your own AI, compiled to your task.
description: kolm is the AI compiler. It turns a task specification into a single signed .kolm artifact: recipes + a small LoRA + a verifier + a vector index + tests, in one file you can run offline anywhere. Every inference emits a verifiable HMAC receipt.

concepts.kolm-artifact: Signed zip containing model.gguf, lora.bin, recipes.json, index.sqlite-vec, verifier.json, manifest.json, signature.sig.
concepts.k-score: K = round(100 * (0.60*T + 0.25*C + 0.15*L), 1) where T is k-sample pass rate, C is recipe coverage, L is latency ratio.
concepts.four-ring-chain: HMAC-SHA256 chain: pre-image -> derived -> execution -> seal. Optionally anchored to Sigstore Rekor.
concepts.rent-vs-buy: Frontier-API spend captured as (input, verified-output) pairs is distilled into a task-specific local LoRA the customer keeps forever.

honestProof.headline: SWE-bench Lite +15.33pp, n=150, seed=42, Opus-4.7, swebench 4.1.0 evaluator. 95% CI [+9.33, +22.00], p<0.05.

byokeyPolicy: All tiers bring their own frontier-API key. kolm never resells tokens.
